items.title: Workflow YAML v2 Authoring Tutorial
items.description: Learn how to write Specflow agentflow v2 YAML with explicit starts, global variables, derived loops, and bounded gate branches.

items.title: Specflow Commands
items.description: Learn what specflow, specflow validate, and specflow run do, and how to pass workflow variables.

items.title: Workspace Files
items.description: Learn how workflows, canvas files, agent servers, run records, logs, caches, and assets are stored in a Specflow workspace.

items.title: Aflow Agent Tutorial
items.description: Learn how to use Aflow Agent to create, adapt, validate, run, and continue Specflow workflows.

items.title: Workflow YAML Authoring Tutorial
items.description: Learn the current Specflow workflow YAML format.

items.title: Designer Tutorial
items.description: Learn how to use Designer mode to create UI design projects, preview HTML or React frames, attach references, and record versions.

items.title: Specflow Glossary
items.description: Fixed terms for workflow execution, run control, snapshots, and loop traversal.

items.title: Codex Plugin
items.description: Install and use the Specflow Codex plugin.

items.title: Aflow / UI / Codex Capabilities
items.description: Compare what Aflow Agent, Specflow UI, and the Codex plugin are best suited for.

items.title: Workflow YAML v2 编写教程
items.description: 学习如何用显式 start、全局变量、自动派生循环和 gate branch 次数上限编写 Specflow agentflow v2 YAML。

items.title: Specflow 命令
items.description: 学习 specflow、specflow validate 和 specflow run 的用途与 workflow 变量传入规则。

items.title: Workspace 文件
items.description: 了解 Specflow workspace 中 workflow、canvas、agent server、运行记录、日志、缓存和资源文件的作用。

items.title: Aflow Agent 使用教程
items.description: 学习如何用 Aflow Agent 创建、改写、校验、运行和继续 Specflow workflows。

items.title: Workflow YAML 编写教程
items.description: 学习当前 Specflow workflow YAML 格式。

items.title: Designer 使用教程
items.description: 学习如何使用 Designer 模式创建 UI 设计项目、预览 HTML 或 React frame、附加 reference 并记录版本。

items.title: Specflow 术语表
items.description: 固定 workflow 执行、运行控制、快照和循环经过次数相关术语。

items.title: Codex 插件
items.description: 安装并使用 Specflow Codex 插件。

items.title: Aflow / UI / Codex 能力对比
items.description: 对比 Aflow Agent、Specflow UI 和 Codex 插件分别适合做什么。
